args.query: SELECT Id, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, AccountId FROM Contact WHERE Id = '003Wt00000Jqy8SIAR'

args.query: SELECT Id, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND EffectiveDate <= '2021-06-30'

exec_args.sql: SELECT Id, EffectiveDate FROM "Order" WHERE AccountId = '#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX' AND EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND EffectiveDate <= '2021-06-30'

args.query: SELECT O.Id AS OrderId, O.EffectiveDate, OI.Id AS OrderItemId, OI.Product2Id, P.Name AS ProductName FROM "Order" O INNER JOIN OrderItem OI ON O.Id = OI.OrderId INNER JOIN Product2 P ON OI.Product2Id = P.Id WHERE O.AccountId IN ('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX') AND O.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND O.EffectiveDate <= '2021-06-30'

exec_args.sql: SELECT O.Id AS OrderId, O.EffectiveDate, OI.Id AS OrderItemId, OI.Product2Id, P.Name AS ProductName FROM "Order" O INNER JOIN OrderItem OI ON O.Id = OI.OrderId INNER JOIN Product2 P ON OI.Product2Id = P.Id WHERE O.AccountId IN ('#001Wt00000PGXrNIAX', '001Wt00000PGXrNIAX') AND O.EffectiveDate >= '2021-06-01' AND O.EffectiveDate <= '2021-06-30'
